title: FoodItem
description: A food product formulation record from Trustwell Genesis Foods, including nutrient content, allergen declarations, and label information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the food item.

description.description: Detailed description of the food item.

servingUnit.description: Unit of measure for serving size (e.g., g, mL, oz).

nutrients.description: List of nutrient values for this food item.

allergens.description: List of allergens present or may be present in this food item.

ingredients.description: Ingredients list as it appears on the label.

labels.description: Generated nutrition label images for various regulatory formats.

regulations.description: Applicable regulatory standards for this food item.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the food item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the food item record was last updated.

NutrientValue.description: A nutrient and its measured value for a food item.

nutrientId.description: Unique identifier for the nutrient definition.

name.description: Nutrient name (e.g., Protein, Total Fat, Sodium).

amount.description: Amount of the nutrient per serving.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., g, mg, mcg, IU).

dailyValue.description: Percent daily value based on a 2000-calorie diet.

AllergenDeclaration.description: An allergen declaration for a food item.

allergenId.description: Unique identifier for the allergen definition.

name.description: Allergen name (e.g., Milk, Wheat, Peanuts, Tree Nuts).

NutritionLabel.description: A generated nutrition facts label image for a regulatory format.

format.description: Regulatory format for the nutrition label.

imageUrl.description: URL to the generated nutrition label image.

language.description: Language code for the label (e.g., en, fr, es).
